detail.description:
Invincible: Guarding the Globe is an idle squad RPG set in the Invincible universe featuring a new story never seen in the comics or Amazon Prime TV series, with graphic multi battle action, character collection, team management, idle features and, of course, super-powered visuals.

THE WORLD OF INVINCIBLE
Accompany the highly rated Amazon Prime Video show with the first Invincible mobile RPG.
Embark on a complete campaign with an original story – a new narrative where you join the Global Defens
detail.releaseNotes:
NEW UPDATE
- We're bringing even MORE characters and events from Season 4 of Prime Video's hit Invincible!
- The Lizard League is getting reinforcement with their loyal  Soldiers
- A new GDA Case File is available now: Explore the mystical story of Seance Dog
Minor tech issues resolved
